summary: All happy path steps passed. Login via NextAuth CSRF flow worked correctly. Three tasks with distinct statuses (TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE) and due dates (2, 5, 10 days from now) were created successfully. Filtering by each status via the ?status= query parameter returned only tasks with the matching status, correctly including our test tasks (Task A in TODO, Task B in IN_PROGRESS, Task C in DONE). Sorting by due date ascending via ?sortBy=dueDate&order=asc returned tasks in correct chronological order, with Task B (Apr 3) before Task A (Apr 6) before Task C (Apr 11). Null due dates are placed first in ascending sort. The UI includes a FilterBar component with status filter buttons and a due date sort toggle. Browser verification was done via HTML/component inspection rather than visual rendering.

steps.action: Logged in as alice@example.com via NextAuth CSRF flow (GET /api/auth/csrf then POST /api/auth/callback/credentials)
steps.verification: Got session token cookie, verified via /api/auth/session returning user name 'Alice Johnson' and email 'alice@example.com'

steps.action: Created three tasks: Task A (TODO, due +5 days), Task B (IN_PROGRESS, due +2 days), Task C (DONE, due +10 days)
steps.verification: All three POST /api/tasks requests returned 200 with correct fields. Task A id=cmnfgzjl3000soopgvw8175zm due=2026-04-06, Task B id=cmnfh00l4000uoopgz9du4z80 due=2026-04-03, Task C id=cmnfh067a000woopgme0i7of9 due=2026-04-11. Statuses match requested values.

steps.action: Filtered tasks by status=TODO via GET /api/tasks?status=TODO
steps.verification: Returned 265 TODO tasks. All tasks had status=TODO. Task A was present in results. No IN_PROGRESS or DONE tasks leaked through.

steps.action: Filtered tasks by status=IN_PROGRESS via GET /api/tasks?status=IN_PROGRESS
steps.verification: Returned 57 IN_PROGRESS tasks. Task B was present. All tasks had status=IN_PROGRESS. No TODO or DONE tasks leaked through.

steps.action: Filtered tasks by status=DONE via GET /api/tasks?status=DONE
steps.verification: Returned 55 DONE tasks. Task C was present. All tasks had status=DONE. No TODO or IN_PROGRESS tasks leaked through.

steps.action: Sorted all tasks by due date ascending via GET /api/tasks?sortBy=dueDate&order=asc
steps.verification: 377 total tasks returned. Task B (due Apr 3) appeared at position 42, Task A (due Apr 6) at position 55, Task C (due Apr 11) at position 88 — correct ascending order. All non-null dates were verified to be in ascending order. Null due dates placed first (positions 0-29).

break_findings.description: Submitted POST /api/tasks with empty title ('') and with missing title field
break_findings.result: Both correctly rejected with {"error":"Title is required"}
Task created with status defaulting to TODO — acceptable behavior
break_findings.fix_suggestion: Consider documenting the default status behavior explicitly

break_findings.description: Created task with XSS payload <script>alert('xss')</script> and SQL injection Robert'); DROP TABLE tasks;-- in title
break_findings.result: Both stored successfully without causing errors. XSS is stored as-is in DB (safe because React escapes on render). SQL injection properly handled by Prisma ORM.

break_findings.description: Submitted POST /api/tasks with invalid status value 'INVALID_STATUS'
Filtered tasks with invalid status value via GET /api/tasks?status=INVALID
break_findings.result: Returns all 380 tasks instead of an error or empty array — the invalid filter is silently ignored
break_findings.fix_suggestion: Validate status query parameter on the GET endpoint and return 400 for invalid status values, or at minimum return an empty array
